name: campaign-monitor
description: Manage Campaign Monitor email campaigns, subscriber lists, and transactional email via natural language.
long_description: A full-featured Campaign Monitor MCP server covering campaigns (create, send, schedule, stats), subscriber lists (CRUD, bulk import), transactional email (classic and smart email), and client management.

cm_api_key.title: API Key
cm_api_key.description: Your Campaign Monitor API key (found under Account → API Keys)

cm_client_id.title: Client ID
cm_client_id.description: Your Campaign Monitor Client ID (optional — tools that need it will prompt if not set)
